title: Project Miner Local PM Intake Helper Group Disclosure Controls
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench scroll burden by wrapping the three existing /pm-review/import-intake helper-panel groups in browser-native, default-open disclosure controls while preserving every existing panel id, aria label, anchor target, route link, quick-jump link, export behavior, status behavior, storage boundary, read seam, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Convert the three PM Lane 081 helper-panel group wrappers to native default-open disclosure controls.
Preserve existing child panels, ids, aria labels, anchors, content, storage behavior, exports, route links, quick-jump links, and read seams.
Add focused smoke coverage proving default-open state, collapse/reopen behavior, absence of collapse-state localStorage keys, and continued PM Lane 083 authority guard posture.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar from PM Lane 084 recommended PM Lane 085 as Local PM Intake Helper Group Disclosure Controls after the detail-disclosure pattern landed. The recommendation was accepted as a browser-local ergonomics slice. A separate read-only sidecar completed a PM Lane 086 scout and recommended Local PM Intake Output Action Rail Disclosure Controls as the next non-overlapping lane, with no write ownership in this tranche.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page helper-group wrapper markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for default-open helper disclosure controls and no persisted collapse state.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No existing helper panel aria-label change.
No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
